items.basePrompt: deciduous birch tree tile, white bark, matches reference set, three-quarter top-down, soft drop shadow

master.prompt: slender white bark trunk with dark horizontal marks, full gold-amber autumn canopy in rounded clumps, small grass tuft at the base

children.prompt: deep winter version: the gold canopy is gone, replaced by bare slender gray-brown branches following the same overall canopy silhouette, snow resting along the tops of the limbs, the same white birch trunk with dark marks in the same position, a white snow mound covering the grass at the base; same tree, same size, same composition

animations.motion: subtle idle (Aseprite): the whole tree holds rigid (trunk, canopy, grass tuft, shadow all identical every frame); the only motion is a single gold leaf that detaches from the lower canopy edge and flutters down on an arc once per loop. (Flexing-canopy sway was tried and dropped — a 1px shear of the dense gold canopy boiled; rigid + one drifting leaf reads clean.)
nearly static idle: the bare winter tree holds completely rigid and identical to the source frame; the ONLY motion is a few tiny white snow flecks drifting slowly straight down in front of the tree

animations.physics: autumn to winter (Aseprite erosion/reveal): gold canopy erodes edge/top→inward in a ragged front while staggered gold leaves flutter down on arcs, progressively revealing the snowy winter tree beneath; snow flecks then drift in and the white mound builds over the grass at the base; trunk (x13-16) never moves; f0=autumn keyframe, f11=winter keyframe (both pixel-exact), holds final frame

items.basePrompt: single plump garden pumpkin on a leafy curling vine, game tile, matches reference set, three-quarter top-down, lit from upper-left, selective dark outline, soft drop shadow

master.prompt: ripe deep-orange ribbed pumpkin, dark green curling vine with two leaves, stubby brown stem

children.prompt: winter version: frost-dusted pale orange rind, vine and leaves withered to drooping gray-brown, white snow cap settled on the crown around the stem, small snow mound at the base; same pumpkin, same size, same position

animations.motion: very subtle idle: only the green vine tendrils sway and flex gently in a light breeze; the pumpkin body, colors and overall brightness stay completely constant; no glow, no pulsing, no color change on the rind
subtle idle: sparse tiny snow flecks drift slowly down past the pumpkin, a cold glint shimmers on the snow cap, the pumpkin and snow mound hold rigid

animations.physics: autumn to winter (Aseprite erosion/reveal): the body never moves (same pumpkin); green tendrils wither to gray, then the autumn rind erodes in a wavy crown→down front revealing the frosted winter body beneath (snow cap on the crown, pale rind), and a white mound builds at the base while snow flecks drift; f0=autumn keyframe, f11=winter keyframe (both pixel-exact), holds final frame
